title: Chaetocyperus polymorphus
taxonomy: Chaetocyperus polymorphus is classified as a species of red algae within the family Chaetophoraceae, which belongs to the class Rhodophyceae. This classification is based on its cellular structure, pigmentation, and reproductive characteristics. As a member of the phylum Rhodophyta, it is one of the many species of red algae found in marine environments. The family Chaetophoraceae is a group of red algae characterized by the presence of chaetophoralean thalli, which are filamentous and contain chloroplasts. Chaetocyperus polymorphus is an example of a species within this family, exhibiting its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment.
